articles.title: President Trump Calls for Unity After Another Scary Incident
articles.summary: After a man tried to rush past security at a hotel, President Trump asked Americans to come together. He said politics has become too violent.

articles.title: The World's Biggest Art Heist: Still a Mystery After 36 Years
articles.summary: In 1990, thieves stole 13 famous paintings from a Boston museum. The art is worth over $500 million, and no one has found it yet.

articles.title: Iran Makes Big Changes to Help People Buy Food During War
articles.summary: Iran is giving cheap money to buy food and medicine after a war with the US and Israel. People are struggling to afford basic things.
